EmailTemplate.description: Email to candidates with links to ALS providers
EmailTemplate.name: ARRH - ALS providers
EmailTemplate.subject: Recommended ALS providers
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
Thank you for your enquiry.
Below are providers for Advanced Life Support courses:
Crana: crana.org.au/courses/advanced-life-support
The Australian College of Critical Care Nurses Ltd (ACCCN) acccn.com.au/als/als-courses
PLEASE NOTE: These courses are suggestions only, it is always best to also do your own research.
Kind regards, {!User.FirstName} Alliance Rural & Remote Health Tel: 07 4998 5550
